scope: wave2 fan-out migration: users and app_collections are single-request Tier-1 endpoints; app_lists and ratings are per-config-list sub-resource fan-out reads (one HTTP request per configured collection/ext_id) that the declarative dialect has no primitive for — see docs.md Known limits.

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out: legacy issues one request per configured app_collection_ids entry (or discovers ids from account/apps first) and stamps the enclosing collection id onto each row — a StreamHook-shaped multi-request traversal the declarative dialect cannot express (ENGINE_GAP); Tier-2 hooks are out of scope for this wave
sub-resource fan-out: legacy issues one request per configured ext_ids entry and flattens ratings.list rows with the enclosing ext_id/store stamped on — same ENGINE_GAP as app_lists
